workItem.author: marius-patrik
workItem.title: Resolve explicit maximum-capability escalation
workItem.body: High-tier analysis exhausted its safe options and recorded an explicit owner-approved escalation.
comments: Reconstruct the decision boundary and return a safe continuation path.

policy.branching: Use the normal reviewed issue-to-PR lane for any resulting implementation.
policy.enforcement: The maximum tier is explicit escalation only; it grants no bypass or additional authority.

facts: An owner-approved maximum-tier escalation is recorded on the work item.
